name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text: ℹ️ How to use Crypto Watchlist Alerts 1. Tap /start to open the main menu 2. Add cryptocurrencies to your watchlist 3. Set price alerts (threshold or percent move) 4. Get notified when conditions are met 📱 Available Commands /start — Open the main menu /help — Show this help message /add — Add a ticker to your watchlist /remove — Remove a ticker from your watchlist /price — Check current prices /dashboard — View usage statistics (owner only) ⚙️ Settings Configure quiet hours, daily summaries, and alert cooldown in the settings menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
